spine_methodology: WebSearch surface of TX tree care companies + direct WebFetch verification of business websites for founder, year, team, services. ISA Texas Chapter directory and TCIA directory at tcia.org returned HTTP 403 (Cloudflare); fallback: each candidate verified via own website (where reachable). Every row has a verified source URL with timestamp. Platform-acquirer subsidiaries (Davey, SavATree, BrightView, Bartlett, Monarch, Yellowstone) deliberately excluded — see exclusions array.
exclusions: Bartlett Tree Experts (F.A. Bartlett family-owned strategic acquirer — corporate locations excluded as they ARE the platform; 6 TX corporate offices in Houston, Dallas, Austin x2, Southlake, San Antonio)
Franchise/national brands without TX-rooted founder profile
